title: AVERT Validation Outcome
description: Outcome of the AVERT Validate step: a deterministic set of pre-flight checks that gate Execute. Kept consistent with the Apier reference implementation's live dry-run outcome — `all_passed` is a boolean and each check's `error_code` is a nullable string (null on a passing check).

all_passed.description: True if and only if every check in `checks` passed. Execute MUST NOT proceed when this is false.

checks.description: One entry per deterministic pre-flight check.

id.description: Which pre-flight check this entry reports.

error_code.description: Stable, machine-readable failure code when `status` is `fail`; null when `status` is `pass`. Nullable-string typing mirrors the reference implementation's live validation contract.

message.description: Human-readable summary of the check result. On validation failures this names field paths only, never field values.
